api.authDescription: Bearer token obtained via OAuth 2.0 authorization.
api.bodyFallback: Request body — see code example below.
api.intro.title: API Reference
api.intro.desc: Browse and explore the Longbridge OpenAPI HTTP endpoints. Select an endpoint from the sidebar to view parameters, request examples, and response schemas.
api.intro.httpDesc: This reference covers HTTP-based APIs for trading, quotes, and portfolio management. All endpoints require OAuth 2.0 Bearer token authentication.
api.intro.wsDesc: Real-time data such as live quotes and order status updates are delivered via WebSocket or TCP connections.
api.intro.hint: Select an endpoint from the sidebar to get started
parameters.title: Parameters
parameters.noParameters: No parameters required for this API
authorization.title: Authorization
IRVNYbFKip3CIbruOx4-4: Support all product types in HK, US, and CN markets
Uqmclqxw6dQbP3jwc6G7e: Advanced quotes such as Level 2 and National BBO are available
5diFZtxSkEDAgBUnWcKb5: Support access to historical candlestick quotes data
_mlScbvyg8lDxhHsROlbK: Support the trading of stocks, options, bonds, funds, and other products in the US&HK markets
4iQqxIDsChn9iZmM5571k: Supports multiple order types such as general order, conditional order, and attach order
M8nA_Jg5s7ucI5fLT93x0: Functions include placing orders, amending orders, canceling orders, viewing account positions and funds
igUuE7b16XAv4XV1cz2Uo1: Support LLM standards, including LLMs Text, MCP etc., for you to easily use AI to build your idea.
OG258Y1lxxNYjOsg6gH4K: Open an account to receive HK market LV2 quotes and CN market LV1 quotes for free
authorization.autoFill: Auto filled with simulated account authorization information
home.subtitle:
Programmatic market data and trading API for quantitative investors.
Build trading strategies, AI workflows, and automation systems.
home.grid.intro: Four products, one platform — from market data to AI-powered analysis
home.grid.openapi: Real-time quotes, historical K-lines, depth data, and trade execution. HK, US, CN, SG markets with 6 SDKs.
home.grid.mcp: Hosted MCP service for Claude, Cursor, Zed and other AI tools. OAuth one-click auth, query quotes and trade.
home.grid.cli: 40+ commands for quotes, trading, financial reports, screening, and technical analysis. JSON/CSV/Markdown output.
home.grid.skill: One command to inject full Longbridge knowledge into any AI assistant. Auto-detects stock symbols and market queries.
home.stats.freeSub: OpenAPI access at no cost. Only standard trading commissions apply.
home.openapi.value: Build quant strategies, trading bots, and research tools in Python/Rust/Go
home.openapi.title: Unified API for HK, US, CN market data and trading
home.openapi.desc: HTTP REST and WebSocket access to real-time quotes and historical data. Execute trades programmatically. 6 SDKs, free to use.
home.openapi.feat1.title: Real-time Push
home.openapi.feat1.desc: L1/L2 depth, tick-by-tick trades, capital flow, market temperature — WebSocket push straight to your strategy engine.
home.openapi.feat2.title: Programmatic Trading
home.openapi.feat2.desc: Limit, market, conditional, trailing stop — manage the full order lifecycle in code.
home.openapi.feat3.title: 6 Languages, One API
home.openapi.feat3.desc: Python, Node.js, Rust, Go, Java, C++ — built-in rate limiting and auto-reconnect. First quote query in 5 minutes.
home.openapi.feat4.title: Backtest-ready Data
home.openapi.feat4.desc: Minute-to-monthly candlesticks, financial reports, earnings forecasts, ratings — everything you need for backtesting.
home.mcp.value: Your AI coding assistant gets live market data — code and research in one place
home.mcp.title: One config line to connect Claude, Cursor to financial data
home.mcp.desc: Hosted MCP service — AI tools query quotes, manage accounts, execute trades directly. OAuth 2.1 one-click auth, no API keys needed.
home.mcp.feat1.title: One-click Setup
home.mcp.feat1.desc: Add one command in Claude Code, authorize in browser — done. Credentials auto-refresh, revoke anytime.
home.mcp.feat2.title: Code & Research Together
home.mcp.feat2.desc: Ask "what's TSLA at?" or "place a limit order" right in your IDE. AI fetches live data and executes trades.
home.mcp.feat3.title: All Major AI Tools
home.mcp.feat3.desc: Claude Code, Cursor, Zed, ChatGPT, Codex, Cherry Studio — every AI tool you use can connect.
home.cli.value: Check quotes, read earnings, place trades — right from your terminal
home.cli.title: AI-native CLI covering quotes, trading, and analysis
home.cli.desc: One command to get real-time quotes, analyze earnings, screen stocks, and manage orders. Output in JSON/CSV/Markdown for scripts and AI workflows.
home.cli.feat1.title: Real-time Quotes
home.cli.feat1.desc: Check TSLA, 700.HK and other global stocks — real-time prices, order book depth, and intraday charts with WebSocket push.
home.cli.feat2.title: Earnings & Valuation
home.cli.feat2.desc: Pull full financial statements, PE/PB/PS comparisons, analyst consensus, institutional ratings, and insider trades in one command.
home.cli.feat3.title: Smart Screening
home.cli.feat3.desc: Screen HK, US, CN stocks by market cap, PE, and technical signals. MACD, KDJ, RSI diagnosis from daily to 15-min timeframes.
home.skill.value: Ask Claude or Cursor to analyze stocks and execute trades — in plain language
home.skill.title: One command to give AI full financial knowledge
home.skill.desc: AI auto-detects stock symbols and market queries, intelligently invoking quotes, analysis, screening, and trading. Works in Chinese and English.
home.skill.feat1.title: Natural Language Driven
home.skill.feat1.desc: Say "show me TSLA earnings" or "screen tech stocks with PE under 25" — AI understands and runs the right tools automatically.
home.skill.feat2.title: Full-stack Analysis
home.skill.feat2.desc: Cross-market screening, technical diagnosis, earnings comparison, institutional tracking — a complete research-to-trade workflow.
home.skill.feat3.title: Instant Setup
home.skill.feat3.desc: One npx command installs globally. Includes CLI reference, Python/Rust SDK APIs, and all type definitions.
home.marketCoverage.title: Markets & SDKs
home.marketCoverage.subtitle: Stocks, ETFs, options, warrants, and CBBC across four markets. Open an account to receive HK LV2 and CN LV1 quotes for free.
